tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]      [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Fm[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Fm[/ch]
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]G/B[/ch]           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]FMaj7[/ch]   [ch]Fm[/ch]
               [ch]Do[/ch] [ch]Do[/ch] De Doo                [ch]Do[/ch] [ch]Do[/ch] De [ch]Do[/ch]          [ch]Do[/ch] [ch]Do[/ch] De [ch]Do[/ch]   Oo

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
           We couldn't turn around[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]
'Til we were upside down        I'll be the bad guy now[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
But no I ain't so proud              I couldn't be there[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]
Even when I tried        You don't believe it[/tab]

We do this every time

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G/B[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Seasons change and our love went cold    Feed the flame 'cause we can't let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]
Run away but we're running in circles   Run away  run away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]
I dare you to do something     I'm waiting on you again[/tab]

So I don't take the blame
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]
Run away but we're running in circles   Run away run away[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    N.C.                      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Let go   I got a feeling that it's time to let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]                       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]
I said so I knew that this was doomed from the get go[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]                        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
You thought that it was special special     But it was just the sex though the sex though[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]                              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]
And I still hear the echoes                 I got a feeling that it's time to let it go[/tab]

Let it go

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G/B[/ch]              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Seasons change and our love went cold    Feed the flame 'cause we can't let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]
Run away but we're running in circles   Run away run away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]
I dare you to do something     I'm waiting on you again[/tab]

So I don't take the blame
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]
Run away but we're running in circles   Run away run away[/tab]

Run Away

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G/B[/ch]                         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Maybe you don't understand what I'm going through   It's only me what you got to lose[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch]                        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Make up your mind      tell me what are you gonna do[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm[/ch]
It's only me[/tab]

Let it go

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G/B[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
(Audience sings)                           Feed the flame 'cause we can't let go)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]
Run away but we're running in circles   Run away, run away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]                    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]
I dare you to do something     I'm waiting on you again[/tab]
So I don't take the blame
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]G/B[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Run away but we're running in circles   Run away, run away run away[/tab]

Thank you so very much ladies and gentlemen   thank you
